title: IT Security-Oracle IAM Engineer
description:
Job Description:

We are hiring an experienced IAM Manager (Oracle Identity Governance) for a consulting engagement with a top-tier professional services firm. The role involves leading the design, development, and management of IAM solutions using OIG/OIM in complex enterprise environments. You’ll be involved in both solution delivery and governance, working with consulting teams deployed at end-client sites.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead end-to-end implementation of Oracle Identity Governance (OIG/OIM) .
  • Develop and configure custom connectors, workflows, entitlements, and approval policies.
  • Customize OIM UI (Oracle ADF) and audit reports (BI Publisher).
  • Build and support Java-based custom components (event handlers, schedulers, plugins).
  • Administer IAM environments (DEV to PROD); ensure system security and performance.
  • Define IAM policies and support compliance, audit, and governance needs.
  • Collaborate with consulting teams and support escalations from the client side.

Requirements:

  • Proven experience in Oracle Identity Governance (OIG/OIM) and Java development.
  • Hands-on with ICF connectors, REST APIs, and SOA composites.
  • Strong knowledge of IAM governance, compliance, and troubleshooting.
  • Experience with BI Publisher, ADF customizations, and secure coding practices.

postedCompany.description:
SAGL Consulting was established in year 2016 by group of experienced head-hunters in Singapore. The founders realised the need for an executive search firm with sole focus on technology recruitment and works on the recruitment practices suited for it.


The firm was set up to bring top IT recruiters together who have passion to get the best talents for their clients.The recruitment practice in the firm is designed to create a strong network of technology professionals and leaders.We give utmost importance to keep the candidate information confidential and provide consultancy for career progression.


We use the agile methodology of recruitment and have adopted AI powered solutions for getting the best talents in the market. But always keeping the human touch first to give you true experience of boutique recruitment.
postedCompany.name: SAGL CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
